Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) The subscription name.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • tenant_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • seller_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • product_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • subscription_details - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • source_type - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • additional_details - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • realm - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • region - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
